title: Canscora helferiana
taxonomy: Canscora helferiana is classified within the family Gentianaceae, a large family of flowering plants commonly known as gentians. It belongs to the genus Canscora, which is a group of tropical flowering plants found primarily in India and Southeast Asia. Canscora helferiana is a species of flowering plant native to the Western Ghats region of India. The plant is typically classified as a perennial herb, with a variety of uses in traditional medicine and as an ornamental plant. Further classification of Canscora helferiana can be determined by its botanical name and specific characteristics.
